title: Interest, dividends, etc., credited to accumulation account
doc_html:
§951.49.  Interest, dividends, etc., credited to accumulation account

Any amount earned in the form of interest, dividends, rents or other income received from the investments and reinvestment of the funds of the retirement system, shall be credited to the pension accumulation account.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1079 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
